response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for the performance of 'Hajimari no Mahou -charm-'. 2. N/A. 3. The Reference JSON contained only partial lyrics; I have transcribed the full song and the preceding talk segment. 4. Confirmed text matches full audio duration without early cutoffs or cross-pause merging. Groups phrases logically under 50 characters.

subtitles.original: 空は青く澄み渡り
subtitles.english: The sky is clear and blue

subtitles.original: 海を目指して歩く
subtitles.english: Walking towards the sea

subtitles.original: 怖いものなんてない
subtitles.english: There's nothing to be afraid of

subtitles.original: 僕らはもう一人じゃない
subtitles.english: We're not alone anymore

subtitles.original: 空は青く澄み渡り
subtitles.english: The sky is clear and blue

subtitles.original: 海を目指して歩く
subtitles.english: Walking towards the sea

subtitles.original: 怖くても大丈夫
subtitles.english: It's okay even if you're scared

subtitles.original: 僕らはもう一人じゃない
subtitles.english: We're not alone anymore

subtitles.original: みんな、今日はありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you for today!

subtitles.original: 最高に楽しいハロウィンだったよね？みんな！
subtitles.english: It was the best, most fun Halloween, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: ちょっとアクシデントもあったけどさ、
subtitles.english: There were some accidents, but,

subtitles.original: いいお宝
subtitles.english: A great treasure

subtitles.original: いい思い出になったんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Didn't it become a good memory?

subtitles.original: ワンダー！
subtitles.english: Wonder!

subtitles.original: さて、そろそろお時間となってまいりましたが…
subtitles.english: Well, it's about time to end, but...

subtitles.original: アンコール！アンコール！
subtitles.english: Encore! Encore!

subtitles.original: アンコール！アンコール！
subtitles.english: Encore! Encore!

subtitles.original: それじゃ、アンコールにお応えして、
subtitles.english: Then, in response to the encore,

subtitles.original: この曲、歌っちゃうのなー！
subtitles.english: We'll sing this song!

subtitles.original: はじまりの魔法 -charm-！
subtitles.english: Hajimari no Mahou -charm-!

subtitles.original: はじまりの魔法 -charm-
subtitles.english: The Beginning of Magic -charm-

subtitles.original: きみに 魔法をかけるよ
subtitles.english: I will cast a spell on you

subtitles.original: We cast a spell on your dream!!
subtitles.english: We cast a spell on your dream!!

subtitles.original: はじまりを告げる 衝動が響く
subtitles.english: The impulse that signals the start echoes

subtitles.original: 気づいた時がいつだって
subtitles.english: Whenever you realize it,

subtitles.original: スタートラインなんだ
subtitles.english: it's always the starting line

subtitles.original: 守るものもなかった
subtitles.english: I had nothing to protect

subtitles.original: キミを変えたのは
subtitles.english: What changed you was

subtitles.original: 見つけたばかりのちっぽけな
subtitles.english: A small, newly found

subtitles.original: 希望の輝きの原石
subtitles.english: gemstone of shining hope

subtitles.original: どうして 私だけ うまくいかないんだろう
subtitles.english: Why am I the only one who can't do it right?

subtitles.original: 自分以外のすべてが 眩しく見えるけど
subtitles.english: Everything except myself looks so dazzling

subtitles.original: ねぇ キミに見つけてほしくて
subtitles.english: Hey, I wanted you to find me

subtitles.original: なりたい私になる 今こそ
subtitles.english: I'll become the me I want to be, starting now

subtitles.original: そうだ 叶えたい 掴みたい 夢があるから
subtitles.english: There's a dream I want to fulfill and grasp

subtitles.original: 塞ぎこんだ日の言葉連れて
subtitles.english: Bringing along the words from shut-in days,

subtitles.original: 歩き出すんだ
subtitles.english: I'll start walking

subtitles.original: 信じる力が 奇跡を起こすように
subtitles.english: So that the power of belief makes miracles happen

subtitles.original: きみに 魔法をかけるよ
subtitles.english: I will cast a spell on you

subtitles.original: We cast a spell on your dream!!
subtitles.english: We cast a spell on your dream!!

subtitles.original: 叶った望みと
subtitles.english: Fulfilled desires and

subtitles.original: 叶わない願い
subtitles.english: unfulfilled wishes

subtitles.original: それぞれが等しく流れてく世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where they flow equally

subtitles.original: 何を求めて 歩き続けてるんだろう
subtitles.english: What am I seeking as I keep walking?

subtitles.original: いつまでもこのまま 迷い子と
subtitles.english: Always remaining a lost child like this

subtitles.original: キミがくれたこの空が
subtitles.english: The sky you gave me

subtitles.original: 消えない翼をくれたね
subtitles.english: Gave me wings that won't disappear

subtitles.original: そうだ 照らしたい 届けたい 人がいるから
subtitles.english: Because there's someone I want to shine for

subtitles.original: 二度ともう一人ぼっちには 戻りはしないんだ
subtitles.english: I will never go back to being alone again

subtitles.original: 愛したい 応えたい 自分自身の日に
subtitles.english: I want to love and respond to my own days

subtitles.original: 正解なんて これでいいと
subtitles.english: Correct answers? "This is fine,"

subtitles.original: 見たい景色の先
subtitles.english: at the end of the scenery I want to see

subtitles.original: どんな場所でもいいよ
subtitles.english: Any place is fine

subtitles.original: どんな姿でもいい
subtitles.english: Any form is okay

subtitles.original: 追いかけたいんだ あの煌めきを
subtitles.english: I want to chase after that sparkle

subtitles.original: 希望を 光を 力を 連れて
subtitles.english: Bringing hope, light, and power

subtitles.original: 抱きしめて 持っていこう
subtitles.english: Let's embrace them and take them with us

subtitles.original: ほら 繋げたい 広げたい 道があるから
subtitles.english: Look, because there's a path to expand

subtitles.original: ここから始まる 物語を
subtitles.english: Let's walk together through

subtitles.original: 一緒に歩こう
subtitles.english: the story that starts here

subtitles.original: 信じる力が 奇跡を起こすように
subtitles.english: So that the power of belief makes miracles happen
